nodes.name: Histurgops
nodes.summary: Histurgops（Histurgops）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Rufous-tailed weaver。

nodes.name: Rufous-tailed weaver
nodes.summary: The rufous-tailed weaver (Histurgops ruficauda) is a species of songbird found in Tanzania. It is included in the weaver family (Ploceidae), but many authors included it in the Old World sparrow family Passeridae when Old World sparrows were separated from the weavers proper. It is placed in the monotypic genus Histurgops. It is an endemic breeder in Tanzania, but vagrants occur in Kenya too. References
